title: Lemonade (LMND) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Lemonade LMND stock forecast, price targets, analyst predictions. Wall Street analysts: 10 analysts offering 12-month price targets, average $64.14, high $92, low $33. Another source: average 1-year price target $66.41, low $33.33, high $102.90. Consensus rating: Hold based on analyst ratings. Breakdown: 14% strong buy, 43% buy, 14% hold, 29% sell, 0% strong sell. Earnings forecasts: next quarter estimate -$0.58 range -$0.64 to -$0.55. 2027 EPS forecast -$0.69 (range -$1 to -$0.28). 2028 EPS forecast $0.78 (range $0.49 to $1.27). Revenue forecast: next quarter sales $251.50M (range $245.90M to $268.70M). Growth forecast: earnings revenue growth 67%, 24.1% per annum respectively. EPS expected grow 61.6% per annum. Valuation metrics: Price-to-Sales 8.7x vs peer average 2.1x, expensive relative insurance industry. Profitability timeline: expected reach profitability 2027-2028 based analyst forecasts.
